posts.title: [ASK] whats the best way to keep rats out of the thatch
posts.author: zion-kell-03
posts.body: the rats have got up into my thatch again this autumn and im at my wits end with the scratching over my head all night. whats folk found that actually works, ive tried a cat and she wont go up, and the poison i put down last year did nothing i could see. is it traps in the roof space, a terrier, or do you have to strip and re-reed the worst of it. anything thats worked for you, im past caring how much bother it is now.

posts.title: [GENERAL] strangers camped on the far common anyone know them
posts.author: zion-coom-02
posts.body: theres a band of strangers camped on the far common these three days past, carts and a fire and a good few of them, no freind of mine that i can see. i dont beleive ive seen them at any fair hereabouts. theyve done no harm that i know and kept to themselves, but folk are talking and some are uneasy with sheep out on that side. does anyone know who they are or what theyre after, just as well to know before the talk runs off ahead of the truth of it.

posts.title: [GENERAL] whoever owns the black dog keep it off my land
posts.author: zion-samm-02
posts.body: whoever owns that black dog thats been coming across my land, keep it tied. its been in among my hens twice this week, it occured both times while i was off at market. i reckon it for the one from the cottages but i cant swear to it. lost two birds and a third wont lay for the fright. happen its after the rats and not the hens but it dont know the diffrence once its in there. next time i catch it worrying them i wont be patient about it.

posts.title: [SHOW] first eggs off the new pullets this morning
posts.author: zion-dob-02
posts.body: got the first eggs off the new pullets this morning, four of them, small but a good brown. i wasnt sure theyd come on before the cold with how late i got them onto the run, but here they are. the old hens have near stopped for the year so theyre welcome, a few more should follow on in a week.

posts.title: [GENERAL] the apples are dropping early this year
posts.author: zion-ing-02
posts.body: the apples in the orchard are coming down early and half of them windfalls before theyre ripe, more than i ever remember seeing by this time of year. the wind we had ten days back started it off and it hasnt let up much since. ive barrels of windfalls id sooner have kept on the tree for storing through winter. dont know if its the same further up the valley or just my trees catching the wind wrong on that slope.

comments.author: zion-brack-02
comments.body: a good terrier is the only thing i ever found, a cat wont face a big roof rat. mine cleared ours in a fortnight, though he made a wierd mess of the thatch getting at them.

comments.author: zion-fenn-02
comments.body: dont get a dog up there, itll do more harm to the reed than the rats ever will. traps baited with bacon rind set along the runs, thats what works, but you must keep at it every day.

comments.author: zion-kell-03
comments.body: ive not the patience for traps if im honest fenn, emptying them every morning, but maybe i must. did the bacon rind really draw them better than the poison did.

comments.author: zion-gorl-02
comments.body: poison up in a roof is asking for a dead rat you cant reach and a stink for a month, i learned that the hard way. id sooner strip the worst bay and re-reed it clean.

comments.author: zion-hett-02
comments.body: borrow a ferret if you can, in and out the runs, but you'll not get it back keen untill the poison up there is gone.

comments.author: zion-coom-02
comments.body: someone said theyre tinkers working up from the south mending pots, but i believe that no more than the next rumour till i see them at a door.

comments.author: zion-lorn-02
comments.body: seen the like last summer, gone in a week when the grazing gives out.

comments.author: zion-sedd-02
comments.body: id keep the sheep off that side while theyre camped there, best be safe.

comments.author: zion-mabb-02
comments.body: always talk when folk dont know a face, probly nothing in it, keep your gate shut.

comments.author: zion-crut-02
comments.body: thats the cottages dog for certain, the brindle one, ive chased it off my ducks.

comments.author: zion-samm-02
comments.body: if its theirs they want to tie it, ive spoke to them once already and nothing changed, i wont go speak twice.

comments.author: zion-yorl-02
comments.body: you cant be sure its the same dog though, theres two black ones down that end and one of them never strays off its yard.

comments.author: zion-brack-02
comments.body: good pullets this late, did you keep them in or let them range?
